name: Witchcrafter in Profusion
desc: Fusion Summon 1 Spellcaster Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field as Fusion Material. If you Fusion Summon a "Witchcrafter" Fusion Monster, you can also use 1 Spell in your hand as 1 of the materials. If a Spell(s) is discarded while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Spell in your GY or that is banished; add 1 Spell with the same name as that targeted card from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Witchcrafter in Profusion" once per turn.
strings: Use 1 Spell in your hand as Fusion Material?
Use 1 Spell in your hand as Fusion Material?
